title: World Cup 2026 — 48 teams, one bracket, total chaos (demo TikTok)
story: Fast, funny vertical social clip for the 2026 World Cup. Comedic angle: 48 teams for the first time = bracket pandemonium, and everyone suddenly thinks they're a tactical genius. Beats: the tournament is HUGE (48 teams, 3 host nations, 104 matches) → your 'perfect bracket' is destroyed by day one → everyone in the group chat is now a pundit → just enjoy the chaos. NOT a betting ad — pure football-fan comedy showcasing the video skill. Real facts only: 11 June – 19 July 2026, hosted by USA, Canada, Mexico, 48 teams (a first), 16 host cities. No FIFA emblem/trophy marks. High energy, meme-paced, caption-driven.

source.query: 2026 FIFA World Cup format 48 teams host cities dates schedule fan facts
